notes.zh: 柯克帕特里克、格拉特和维基 1983 年发表的模拟退火原始论文。
notes.en: The 1983 primary paper on simulated annealing by Kirkpatrick, Gelatt, and Vecchi.

title.zh: 《用快速计算机进行状态方程计算》
title.en: Equation of State Calculations by Fast Computing Machines

notes.zh: Metropolis 等人 1953 年提出随机接受机制的原始论文，模拟退火由此继承采样思想。
notes.en: The 1953 primary paper by Metropolis and colleagues that introduced the stochastic acceptance mechanism adapted by simulated annealing.

title.zh: 《随机松弛、Gibbs 分布与图像的贝叶斯恢复》
title.en: Stochastic Relaxation, Gibbs Distributions, and the Bayesian Restoration of Images

notes.zh: Geman 与 Geman 1984 年关于退火式随机松弛和缓慢降温收敛条件的早期理论研究。
notes.en: Geman and Geman's 1984 early theoretical study of annealing-style stochastic relaxation and slow-cooling convergence conditions.

notes.zh: SciPy 官方文档，用于说明现代双重退火实现中的温度、重启与接受参数。
notes.en: Official SciPy documentation for temperature, restart, and acceptance parameters in a modern dual-annealing implementation.

title.zh: 1983 年模拟退火论文 PDF 镜像

notes.zh: 课程站点保存的 1983 年论文 PDF 镜像，仅作辅助阅读。
notes.en: Course-site PDF mirror of the 1983 paper, retained for supplementary reading.

title.zh: 斯科特·柯克帕特里克个人主页

notes.zh: 耶路撒冷希伯来大学计算机科学与工程学院托管的人物主页，也是本地肖像的来源页。
notes.en: Profile hosted by the Hebrew University of Jerusalem School of Computer Science and Engineering and the source page for the localized portrait.
